CustomField.description: Date the agency formally adopted this sponsor-prepared document into the official administrative record. The period between document upload and this date quantifies the agency's independent review time — a critical metric for demonstrating supervisory control in APA litigation. Required when nepa_document_custody__c = Agency Adopted.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date the agency formally adopted this sponsor-prepared document. Captures independent review duration for APA defensibility.
CustomField.label: Agency Adopted Date
